zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers II是Richard de Praers I和Galtha de Praers的兒子，於1117年出生在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可。他於大約1132年與Mrs. Galtha e Praers在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1167年之後在英國爾南特維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers II是Richard de Praers I和Galtha de Praers的儿子，于1117年出生在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可。他于大约1132年与Mrs. Galtha e Praers在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1167年之后在英国爾南特維其。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers II was born in 1117, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard de Praers I and Galtha de Praers. He married Mrs. Galtha e Praers about 1132, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died after 1167, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers II est né en 1117, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard de Praers I et Galtha de Praers. Il a épousé Mrs. Galtha e Praers environ 1132, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé après 1167, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers IIは1117年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでRichard de Praers IとGaltha de Praersの息子として生まれた。約1132年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでMrs. Galtha e Praersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1167年以後にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers II(은)는 1117년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 Richard de Praers I(와)과 Galtha de Praers의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1132년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 Mrs. Galtha e Praers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1167년 이후 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Mrs. Galtha e Praers aproximadamente 1132, em Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1167, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers II родился в 1117 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Richard de Praers I и Galtha de Praers. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Galtha e Praers около 1132 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер после 1167 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия.
